programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and the team head to Chessington to create a car-themed garden for hospital worker and automobile fan Alan Rendall. In July 2014, he managed to rescue his unconscious neighbour, Roy Whiteway, from his burning house, but was unable to save Dorothy, Roy's wife, as the fire was so intense. To recognise his bravery, Alan and the team surprise the whole Rendall family and turn their featureless plot into an automobile-inspired haven.(n)

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and the team are in Hemel Hempstead, Hertfordshire, where they meet deaf couple Asif Iqbal and wife Sabina. The green-fingered experts attempt to turn a boring lawn and crumbling patio into a Bollywood dream garden with an outdoor kitchen for Asif, Sabina and their family.(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Oliver's recovery hits a setback and David continues his quest for kicks when he approaches some youths on bikes and purposely shoves one of them over. James struggles with locker-room banter and Gemma shows Chesney her vlog, but makes it clear she has no intention of putting it online after her humiliating turnstile experience.(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: David is chased by an angry mob and cornered in an alleyway, while the doctor warns Leanne that it is too soon to be sure, but Oliver may have suffered brain damage. Tommy Orpington assures James he did the right thing coming out, and Chesney urges Gemma to share her vlog online.(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Shona visits Gail and Sarah, but is clearly confused, while Alya visits Yasmeen in prison and assures her that she knows Geoff abused her, but Yasmeen refuses to discuss it. The doctor tells Leanne that Oliver's test results won't be back for a few weeks and he's free to go home, but while Leanne's delighted, convinced he's improving, Steve and Nick mask their concern.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: English country squire Marcus Waverly receives a series of anonymous letters threatening to kidnap his son Johnnie, but the case is dismissed by Scotland Yard - prompting Poirot to open his own investigation. Drama, starring David Suchet and Geoffrey Bateman.(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Ghosts from the past return to haunt Morse as he investigates the apparent suicide of a terminally ill Oxford don whose widow turns out to be the woman the detective was set to marry in his youth. As the case develops, Lewis worries his partner's professionalism is being undermined. Starring John Thaw and Kevin Whately, with Joanna David, Samantha Bond, David Haig, Adrian Dunbar and James Grout.(n)

programme.title: Carry On Up the Khyber (1968)
programme.desc: British forces in colonial India find themselves in deep trouble when a manic local ruler discovers the soldiers' fearsome reputation is thoroughly undeserved - prompting open rebellion. Comedy, starring Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Charles Hawtrey, Roy Castle, Joan Sims, Bernard Bresslaw and Terry Scott.(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The murder of a well-known business tycoon leads Morse to investigate the man's feuding family, and inadvertently makes him the unwitting target of a hate campaign by the tabloids - a problem compounded by his uneasy relationship with a new chief superintendent. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star alongside Gwen Taylor, Martin Clunes, Alun Armstrong, Anna Massey, Charlotte Coleman and Rupert Graves.(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A walk in the woods leads to tragedy for Emily Simpson, who witnesses something unsettling before being found dead in her cottage by old friend Lucy Bellringer. Convinced natural causes are not to blame, Lucy calls in DCI Barnaby and Sergeant Troy, whose investigation eventually uncovers sinister long-buried secrets. The first ever episode of the long-running detective drama, guest starring Jessica Hynes and Emily Mortimer.(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Farmer Alex Preston is found dead at the sacred Crowcall stone circle in Midsomer Mow. Suspicion initially falls on local druids led by high priests Ezra Canning and Leticia Clifford, since Preston's plans to plough Gorse Meadow would have barred their access to the site. Barnaby and Jones are joined by new pathologist Kate Wilding to investigate, and as the case wears on, the inspector becomes convinced greed rather than spiritualism is the motive. Starring Neil Dudgeon, Jason Hughes and Tamzin Malleson.(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A local woman is found murdered following a row with her husband at a residents' association Spanish-themed evening. The finger of suspicion soon points to an odd-job man with a violent history, and the chairman of the association reveals he heard a squeaking noise after the victim left - but the witness promptly winds up dead himself. Crime drama, starring John Nettles.(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Leaving behind his beloved Oxford, Morse and a reluctant Lewis set off to investigate the bizarre death of an Englishwoman who was attending a psychotherapy clinic in northern Italy. Their inquiries lead them to the vineyards and villas of Vicenza and the city of Verona - as well as a glamorous opera singer and a convicted fraudster. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star as the detective duo, with Frances Barber, Michael Kitchen, James Grout and Jolyon Baker.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian detective begins to suspect something is amiss when he visits one of his favoured haunts in London for dinner and discovers a fellow regular has dramatically changed his diet. Down in Brighton, elderly Anthony Gascoigne lies dying while his estranged twin brother Henry falls to his death - but nobody is sure whether the man was deliberately pushed. Bizarrely, the key to the riddle seems to lie in a blackberry pie. David Suchet stars in the title role, with Philip Jackson, Hugh Fraser and Pauline Moran.(n)

programme.title: Wild at Heart
programme.desc: Danny and Alice try to keep their new romance a secret, but have more pressing concerns when she is attacked by a lioness - one of several animals on the loose after the storm. Relations between Leopard's Den and Mara reach breaking point when Vanessa refuses to supply drugs to help dying elephant calf Tula, while Du Plessis is delighted when Caroline arrives at the party.(n)

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Robin's hopes for a night of romance are dashed when Chrissy decides to supervise his girlfriend's visit. Comedy, with Richard O'Sullivan and Paula Wilcox.(n)

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.sub-title: I Won't Dance, Don't Ask Me
programme.desc: Chrissy needs a partner for the annual staff dance, so Robin takes lessons from Mrs Roper. Flat-sharing comedy, starring Richard O'Sullivan, Paula Wilcox and Brian Murphy.(n)

programme.desc: Harriet feels a fraud regarding Will, Mandy steels herself to protect her son and Paul almost blows his cover.(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jamie and Andrea return, Moira is stung by Cain, and Mandy wants Paul to go.(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Andrea knows Jamie is lying, Moira takes out her annoyance on poor Priya, Wendy wants another chance with Bob, and Manpreet has a plan.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: After enjoying a trip to the theatre with Captain Hastings, the detective is disturbed by the sound of gunshots in an apartment at Whitehaven Mansions, and soon finds himself investigating a murder. Drama, starring David Suchet, Hugh Fraser and Philip Jackson.(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Community spirit in the village of Morton Fendle is dealt a blow by the collapse of a craft centre in which many locals had invested - and Alan Hollingsworth, the businessman behind the project, has become a public hate figure. Barnaby investigates when Hollingsworth's wife disappears, and seems to have been kidnapped. However, when Hollingsworth is subsequently murdered and his wife reappears safe and sound, he suspects an elaborate scheme. Roger Allam guest stars.(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby visits a new age commune, where a man has fallen to his death, or may have been pushed. The dead man turns out to have a connection to the leader's shady past - they set the commune up together as a confidence trick, but the leader came to believe in what he preaches. A further death raises greater suspicion, especially since a vast inheritance might be coming the group's way. Guest starring Stephen Moyer (True Blood).(n)

programme.title: Carry On Don't Lose Your Head (1966)
programme.desc: A cunning English nobleman puts his talent for disguise to good use by rescuing aristocrats from execution during the French Revolution. However, the leader of the secret police is determined to unmask the elusive hero spiriting the nobility out from under the guillotine. Comedy spoof of the Scarlet Pimpernel story, starring Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Joan Sims, Jim Dale and Charles Hawtrey.(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian sleuth takes a break on the island of Rhodes, where an English beauty draws attention by flirting with fellow guests at the Palace Hotel. When she is found murdered, her husband is immediately suspected, but Poirot quickly deduces there is more to the case than a simple crime of passion. Whodunit, starring David Suchet.(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a woman is drowned in a bath and made to look like a bride, with a chilling lipstick message on the bathroom mirror, it triggers a spate of ghoulish wedding-themed murders in Great Worthy. The case takes Barnaby and Jones to a donkey sanctuary, a heritage steam railway and a pub run by an ex-policeman and former brothel madam as they try to identify the killer. Guest starring Pam Ferris (Rosemary & Thyme) and Kacey Ainsworth (formerly EastEnders' Little Mo).(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Julia McKenzie returns as the sleuthing spinster in the first of three murder mysteries. While staying at a hotel in the Caribbean, Miss Marple investigates the death of a fellow guest, refusing to believe he died of a heart attack. With the help of a business tycoon she sets about finding the real cause of the man's demise, and is soon drawn into a web of deceit and dark magic. Adapted by Charlie Higson and co-starring Antony Sher, Robert Webb, Montserrat Lombard, Daniel Rigby, Hermione Norris, MyAnna Buring, Warren Brown and Oliver Ford Davies.(n)

programme.title: Deep Water
programme.desc: Six-part drama based on the Windermere novels by Paula Daly, following the lives of three women and the personal struggles each of them face. Over-stretched, working mother Lisa never lives up to the expectations she sets herself, and cannot help but compare herself to her female friends, Kate and Roz. Behind closed doors however, each of the women struggle with the pressures to keep up the image of having the 'perfect life'. Starring Anna Friel, Rosalind Eleazar and Sinead Keenan.(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The Oxford detective gains a taste of prison life while investigating the murder of an inmate jailed for a property swindle. The victim's two partners-in-crime are also incarcerated in the same low-security cell block. Morse is determined to find out whether they know anything about the killing, but has to avoid offending the prison authorities while also dealing with a brash subordinate. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with guest appearances by Sean Bean, Richard Wilson, Jim Broadbent, Diana Quick and Steven Mackintosh.(n)

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The detective discovers his half-sister's daughter has committed suicide and sets out to find what prompted it, entering the world of teenage rave parties and drug-taking. Meanwhile, Lewis has his sights set on promotion and studies for exams. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with Sorcha Cusack, Jason Isaacs and John Junkin.(n)

programme.title: Wild at Heart
programme.desc: Following the loss of Leopard's Den, only Danny and Du Plessis remain in South Africa, desperate to raise enough money to buy a new reserve. When pregnant Alice arrives from the UK unannounced, she realises the pair have been lying to her about their jobs, and things go from bad to worse for Danny when a confrontation with Peeters pushes him to breaking point. Robert Bathurst (Cold Feet) joins the cast.(n)

programme.desc: The brewery writes to Bet confirming the sell-off and give her first option to buy the Rovers. Raquel fears for her job and turns to Curly for a shoulder to cry on.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Bill and Raquel start looking for new jobs. Rita considers helping Bet to buy the Rovers. Steve suggests to Vicky that they close down the business and start something more fun.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Roy lays unconscious after losing a couple of fingers in the saw. Emma tries to force Zoe to have a drink with her and Susie. Frank shocks Tina by inviting her to go on holiday.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Mandy is jealous when Tina tells her that she is going to the West Indies with Frank. Nick catches the poachers and threatens them with a shotgun.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A spate of petty thefts is traced to a local nursing home, but Blaketon's investigations uncover something far more sinister. Meanwhile, David's first day in his new job goes spectacularly wrong, but Bernie is not surprised. Rural drama, starring Jason Durr and Derek Fowlds.(n)

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: The Ropers take in a lodger, and Mildred is delighted when he begins doing all the household jobs that George will not tackle. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce.(n)

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: George is told to mind his table manners when Mildred invites her sister round for a meal. Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce star.(n)

programme.title: Man About the House
programme.desc: Chrissy discovers she has an admirer, while Mr Roper thinks his wife is seeing someone else. Comedy series, with Richard O'Sullivan and Brian Murphy.(n)

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: The year is 1940, and Sam is made homeless when a bomb destroys her boarding house, alerting Foyle to a system of organised looting around Hastings. However, when a corpse is found on the beach, the investigation brings the team into conflict with British attempts to secure vital American aid for the war effort. Police drama, starring Michael Kitchen, with Anthony Howell and Honeysuckle Weeks.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Ashfordly Hall throws open its doors to the public, but all hell breaks loose when a collection of valuable Constable sketches is stolen. Mike and Tom are sent to question the chief suspect, an 80-year-old art thief, only to find him mugged and bound to a chair - with none of the paintings anywhere in sight. Nostalgic drama, starring Jason Durr and Ryan Early.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kathy is interviewed by the police about Nick. Kim and Dave go househunting. Kim is determined to confront Tina about going away on holiday with Frank.(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Tina loses her passport ahead of her holiday with Frank. Nick is due to appear in court. The vicar is shocked when Zoe and Emma tell him the blessing ceremony is for them.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Raquel is thrilled to be asked to be Betty's bridesmaid, while Bet tells staff she and Rita are going into partnership. Fiona is pleased to see Steve and Vicky looking miserable.(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Rita has second thoughts about investing in the Rovers, Maxine continues to chase Des despite him continuously standing her up, and Mavis offers to take the Kabin off Rita's hands.(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Troy set out to find a motive for a terminally ill property developer's murder. Many of the Badger's Drift residents have reason to hold a grudge against their charmless neighbour, including a theatre director with unhappy childhood memories, whom Cully gets the chance to work with. Mystery, starring John Nettles, Daniel Casey, Richard Briers and Judy Parfitt.(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Ethel's flirting with Major Bryant lands her in trouble as preparations get under way for a concert at Downton. Tensions flare between Isobel and Cora, Edith receives worrying news about Matthew and William, while Branson declares his feelings for Sybil. Mrs Bird's soup kitchen receives a helping hand from Daisy and Mrs Patmore. Costume drama, starring Penelope Wilton and Elizabeth McGovern.(n)

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: Oxford plays host to a veteran film star, in town to visit a local cinema. However, a mysterious death casts a sinister pall over the occasion, and offers the newly promoted DS Endeavour Morse a fresh case to pursue. Meanwhile, a family visit puts DCI Thursday's hospitality to the test. Inspector Morse prequel, starring Shaun Evans and Roger Allam.(n)

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: Sam and Foyle are shot at and almost run over by a speeding vehicle, and discover the incident is part of an illicit fuel racket. An undercover investigation reveals the detective's son Andrew to be involved, and the discovery that a driver at the petrol company has been murdered complicates matters further. Wartime drama, starring Michael Kitchen, Honeysuckle Weeks and Julian Ovenden.(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle are assigned to protect a deposed African politician, who is due to attend a conference with a view to regaining power. After foiling two assassination attempts, they soon appreciate others share information on his whereabouts. Charles Dance and Geoffrey Palmer feature alongside stars Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins.(n)

programme.title: Giant Lobster Hunters
programme.desc: The Bold contender's skipper Squizzy hopes to capitalise on the season-high lobster price. He hunts around Bruny Island in Southern Tasmania, targeting 1,900 brindle lobsters and is under huge financial pressure to be successful.(n)

programme.title: The Big Fish Off
programme.desc: Team captains Ali Hamidi and Dean Macey are joined by former N-Dubz rapper Dappy and Made in Chelsea star Ollie Locke for a series of fishing challenges on the banks of the River Thames in Oxford.(n)

programme.title: Monster Carp
programme.desc: Tom Dove and Neil Spooner head to the Extremadura region of Spain, fishing for carp weighing up to 80lbs.(n)

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Brian Moore presents highlights from October 1976, including Charlton Athletic v Hull City, Nottingham Forest v Sheffield United and Bury v Brighton & Hove Albion.(n)

programme.title: The Return of Sherlock Holmes
programme.sub-title: The Man with the Twisted Lip
programme.desc: A woman asks Holmes to search for her missing husband, a businessman who was last seen peering from the window of an opium den in London's notorious Limehouse area. Suspicion falls on a well-known local beggar - but his innocence is eventually proved in bizarre fashion. Period drama, starring Jeremy Brett.(n)

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Hound of the Baskervilles (2000)
programme.desc: The sleuth and his faithful assistant Dr Watson accompany the last remaining heir to the Baskerville fortune to his ancestral Dartmoor home, where they protect him from a monstrous spectral hound that is rumoured to prowl the wild Devon heath and is hunting down the family. Mystery based on Arthur Conan Doyle's story, starring Matt Frewer, Jason London, Kenneth Welsh and Emma Campbell.(n)

programme.title: The Cowboys (1972)
programme.desc: An ageing rancher finds himself short-handed when his workers abandon him during a gold rush, and grudgingly hires a group of schoolboys to help him on a 400-mile cattle drive. Although at first they feel out of their depth, the youngsters quickly learn to work like men - but face a dangerous challenge ahead as a gang of rustlers begins to stalk them. Western, with John Wayne, Roscoe Lee Browne and Bruce Dern.(n)

programme.desc: Arthur dabbles in the world of nouvelle cuisine, taking bookings on banquets. However, his chef goes on the run from a group of gangsters leaving him in the lurch when catering for a policeman's retirement party. Vintage comedy drama, starring George Cole and Gary Webster.(n)

programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle suspect Russian intervention when a mentally unstable lieutenant colonel holding valuable Nato secrets disappears from an army psychiatric hospital. Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Gordon Jackson star.(n)

programme.desc: Regan and Carter are confronted by a reporter with information on the unsolved Golden Maid robbery. However, the newsman's strange behaviour raises more questions than answers. Classic police drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman.(n)

programme.desc: An intruder begins breaking into people's homes and destroying their plaster statuettes of Napoleon, but leaving more valuable items untouched. Holmes resolves to find out why, eventually uncovering a twisted tale of theft and murder. Jeremy Brett stars as the master detective.(n)

Creating this life changing vision on a £530k budget, and in only eight months, will not be an easy task, especially as they must build up close to an ancient oak without destroying any of the roots.(n)

programme.title: Guy Martin's D-Day Landing

The first step is to restore one of the planes used in these missions, before undergoing training with the Red Devils parachute display team and the modern parachute regiment. Guy is then ready to make his a descent into the Normandy countryside. Featuring contributions from veterans including a flying nurse, a special forces pathfinder, and a German soldier.(n)

programme.title: Reasons to Be Cheerful with Matt Lucas

programme.title: The Secret World of Lego
programme.desc: Documentary presenting a rare glimpse behind the scenes of the construction kit company, revealing the secrets behind its position as the world's most profitable toy firm. The programme follows a design student as he seeks a coveted job with Lego, as well as meeting an executive who has risen through the ranks from that same position. Meanwhile, two adult fans come up with money-making schemes based on their love of the kits and a 'reputation manager' guides the camera crew through the company's secretive world.(n)

programme.title: The Fantastical Factory of Curious Craft
programme.desc: Recruiter Pierre, business owner Rob, sewing machine enthusiast Betsie, and digital artist Jade are tasked with producing a portrait or sculpture of none other than 'factory boss' Keith Lemon, in a bid to impress Keith and be picked to go through to create a one-off craft for this week's celebrity client, Martin Kemp. Keith chooses his favourite three to go on to craft a bespoke piece for Martin, who is after a one-off dog-themed thank you gift for Supervet Noel Fitzpatrick.(n)

programme.title: Two Sisters, One Body
programme.desc: A coming-of-age story of two Omphalopagus twins. About to leave high school Carmen and Lupita have more than their grades or their rare conjoined condition to think about, they are Mexicans in President Donald Trump's America. Now is a key turning point in their life as their American dream threatens to come to an end.(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: Withnail & I (1987)
programme.desc: Two hard-drinking unemployed actors sharing a grotty flat in late 1960s London think they can escape their miserable existence by decamping to a cottage in the Lake District. But finding no respite from their problems, the less self-destructive of the pair comes to realise he has to leave his friend behind. Cult black comedy, starring Richard E Grant, Paul McGann, Richard Griffiths and Ralph Brown.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: The Sunbeam Alpine, a sleek two-seater convertible, was one of the most stylish British sports cars of the 1960s, and is now back in fashion and much sought after. Former mechanic and motor racing enthusiast Ray bought his Sunbeam Alpine over 20 years ago as a retirement project. Ray was always an active cyclist and skier, but after he suffered a brain injury six years ago he was left with severe disabilities. Knowing how much the car means to him, Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend use all their motoring know-how and parts-blagging guile to get Ray's car back on the road.(n)

programme.desc: Teorin and Collette had high hopes when they let out their five-bedroom family home, but it wasn't long before their tenant stopped paying rent - and then turned the house into a hostel for holiday-makers. Quickly running out of options, the couple turn to eviction specialist Chris Sharpe for help. Plus, Harrow council officers discover 40 people crammed into a potential deathtrap of a house, and a woman who relies on her rent for medical expenses tries to claw back some from her tenant.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: An evasive man in west London is given a choice between paying up or relinquishing his luxury car, there's a writ for the organiser of a music festival, an aggressive rent defaulter needs evicting, and an entire hole family is angered in Hertfordshire when the agents call to collect a loan owed to a woman's ex-partner.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Max and Steve in East London try to recover over £7,000 owed by a restaurant owner for an unpaid gas bill, while officers Gareth and Mitch in Gloucestershire seek just under £3,000 from the owner of a car wash. Stewart and Vic are in Manchester trying to recover nearly £5,000 owed by a blinds and shutters supplier to a dissatisfied customer.(n)

programme.title: 5 News Weekend
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world.(n)

programme.title: Tesco: Panic in the Aisles
programme.desc: Fiona Phillips reports on how the supermarket chain coped with panic buying at the start of the coronavirus crisis and how the nation's shopping habits have started to change. As the public filled their cupboards with more than £2billion worth of extra groceries, Tesco doubled their share of the growing online market, but shelves being stripped bare and thousands of staff having to self-isolate or being off sick provided an enormous logistical challenge.(n)

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Following the hidden army of enforcement teams aiming to clean up the country, including internet entrepreneur Martin, and his partner-in-grime Glen, who have had enough of the fly-tippers plaguing their beloved Hampshire countryside and have decided to fight back using all means at their disposal. In the North East, the Howdon Sewage Treatment plant not only cleans over 12,000 litres of waste water a second, but even manages to turn it into a gas used to heat homes across the region. But to do it, head honcho Tony has to make sure his plant remains blockage free under a constant assault from wet wipes, sanitary products, false teeth and even the occasional 20ft python.(n)

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: Among the UK's wealthiest 10 per cent, the Scaife-Lacy family from Beverley in East Yorkshire trade places with the Flinthams, who live just six miles away in Hull and are in the country's poorest 10 per cent. They swap homes, budgets and lives for seven days as they see what it is like at the other end of the economic spectrum.(n)

programme.title: Most Shocking Celebrity Moments
programme.sub-title: Most Shocking TV Moments of the 00s
programme.desc: Key moments and clips from the decade, featuring Justin Bieber's antics, Lady Gaga's meat dress and Britney Spears' meltdown. Reality TV programmes come to the fore, including George Galloway's turn as a cat in Celebrity Big Brother which shocked the nation, to Katie Price and Peter Andre's love affair on I'm a Celebrity! Featuring contributions from Louis Walsh, Liz McClarnon, Shaun Ryder and Bez, Matt Richardson, Jimmy Bullard, Nish Kumar, Sinitta, Kerry Katona and Kate Lawler.(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: No Details Available.(n)

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip.(n)

programme.title: Chris Tarrant: Extreme Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Chris travels through Argentina, starting his journey at British-built railway station in Buenos Aires and taking an overnight train to the pampas lowlands. In the major port of Bahia Blanca, Chris meets four veterans of the Falklands War and finds out what the locals now think about the British, before ending his journey by riding La Trochita, known in English as the Old Patagonian Express.(n)

programme.title: Britain's Great Cathedrals with Tony Robinson
programme.desc: The actor visits York Minster, which over the past 800 years, has been a backdrop to some of the most dramatic events in British history. It houses more than half of all the world's medieval glass, including the Rose Window, commissioned by Henry VIII, and the East Window, the largest stained glass window in the world. A succession of outspoken bishops of York have defied Nazis, married kings and queens, and more recently championed equality with Archbishop John Sentamu, the country's first black bishop, consecrating the world's first female bishop, Libby Lane, in 2014.(n)

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Property expert Ann Maurice offers advice to Teresa and Nigel Parfitt, the would-be sellers of a two-bedroom semi in Cradley Heath in the heart of the Black Country. Ann sets about ridding the house of its clutter and collectibles, tones down the garish decor and tries to rectify the hygiene problems that come with having four dogs.(n)

programme.title: Nick's Quest
programme.desc: Nick Baker examines the habits of the great white shark, which can grow to 20ft in length. From the safety of an underwater cage, he has an encounter with one of the creatures off the Western Cape of South Africa. He also swims with fur seals and penguins.(n)

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: The work of volunteers treating sick, injured and orphaned animals at a wildlife sanctuary.(n)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: One of Peppa's teeth falls out, so Mummy Pig tells her to expect a visit from the Tooth Fairy.(n)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The car breaks down, so the family gets a shiny new one to replace it.(n)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: George and Peppa take part in a treasure hunt organised by Granny and Grandpa Pig.(n)

programme.title: Mya Go
programme.desc: Members of the Go family get ready to go on holiday, but there is one thing Mama Go must remember - Digger. Animated series for younger viewers.(n)

programme.title: Fireman Sam

programme.sub-title: Noddy and the Case of the Pink Lettuces
programme.desc: When Smartysaurus reveals that she had a special request for pink paint, the Ninjas admit to turning the lettuces into pom-poms to cheer on Pink Ninja in her marathon attempt.(n)

programme.title: Abby Hatcher
programme.desc: Princess Flug thinks Melvin's surprise party is for her, and gets very upset when she realises that it's not.(n)

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas thinks that Raul the Brazilian tank engine is fun because he turns every boring task into a game.(n)

programme.title: Daisy & Ollie
programme.desc: The friends learn the importance of picking up rubbish, and get involved with a community clear-up in the park.(n)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy teaches Peppa and George a game to play indoors while they wait for the rain to stop.(n)

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Everyone is excited to learn that Mummy Rabbit is pregnant.(n)

programme.title: Ricky Zoom
programme.desc: Blip tries to break his dad's record for making deliveries, and his friends help out by placing lots of fake orders.(n)

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: When an ancient relic goes missing from Carlos's archaeological dig, Tracker and Skye must track down the mysterious creature that may have taken it.(n)

programme.title: Floogals
programme.desc: Boomer accidentally inflates a bouncy castle in the garden, and the Floogals get a little more than they bargained for.(n)

programme.title: Becca's Bunch
programme.desc: Becca realises Gill has never been outside the lake, so Becca and the Bunch take their fish friend on a tour of Wagtail Woods.(n)

programme.title: Little Princess
programme.desc: The youngster's plans to be helpful go awry when Chef falls over in the kitchen. Narrated by Julian Clary.(n)

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: Brody's sister Brenda gets lost in the jungle and it is up to the team to find them in the dense foliage of Big Swirl.(n)

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: Turbo tries to play a game of baseball against a mechanical pitcher.(n)

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: The broadcaster and guests discuss the issues of the day, with co-host Storm Huntley joining him for phone-ins and reading out viewers' correspondence.(n)

programme.title: On Benefits
programme.sub-title: On Benefits: To Heat or to Eat?
programme.desc: A single father with six children cannot afford to both feed his family and heat their home, while a man who was seriously injured in a car accident more than 10 years ago struggles to prove to the authorities that he is unable to work, and a woman setting up a fortune telling business faces an uncertain future.(n)

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world.(n)

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Dorothy falls for a man who later confesses to being a priest. Meanwhile, Sophia searches for her lucky handkerchief before a bingo event.(n)

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Sophia's sister creates a rift between the girls, and Rose brings home a talented chicken.(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Willow and Colby take Bella to a recovery centre that specialises in equine therapy. Meanwhile, John and Gemma form an unexpected bond over their respective struggles.(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Naomi is delighted to see Pierce again, until she learns that her old flame is now married to her new boss, while Mackenzie celebrates her 18th birthday.(n)

programme.title: The Husband with Two Wives (2019)
programme.desc: Two young women befriend each other on a college tour and soon discover a shocking secret that threatens to tear both their families apart. Drama, starring Elisabeth Rohm.(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Though Joey is thrilled when his name is used in a magazine crossword puzzle, he is reluctant to let the publication do a profile of him after his last magazine interview got him fired. Rachel persuades him to reconsider so that he can mention her, though Joey insists all his friends be present to ensure he does not say anything too controversial this time.(n)

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Baby Shower
programme.desc: Rachel panics at the thought of caring for her baby and reluctantly agrees to her mother moving in - much to Ross's annoyance. Chandler tries to help Joey prepare for his audition as a TV quiz show host by constantly playing a baffling game.(n)

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world.(n)

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Naomi is delighted to see Pierce again, until she learns that her old flame is now married to her new boss, while Mackenzie celebrates her 18th birthday.(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Willow and Colby take Bella to a recovery centre that specialises in equine therapy. Meanwhile, John and Gemma form an unexpected bond over their respective struggles.(n)

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories.(n)

programme.title: Around the World by Train with Tony Robinson
programme.desc: The actor goes on rail journeys around the globe, jumping on and off trains to find adventure and face challenges, while exploring the history and culture of each place he visits.(n)

programme.title: The World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: The 200-mile Ligne de Cévennes, which travels northwards through the Massif Central to France's volcanic heart - Clermont Ferrand and the spectacular Puy De Dome. The route takes travellers across three incredible historic viaducts, plunges deep underground to explore the area's hidden wildlife and traverses through several impressive valleys. The route winds through one of the world's most spectacular national parks, before reaching its final destination, a collection of 80 dormant volcanoes. Narrated by Bill Nighy.(n)

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers swoop on a housing estate searching for suspects involved in a shooting and it needs to be a tightly controlled operation and communication is key between the firearms unit, police helicopters and dog handler Duncan. Elsewhere, Steve responds to reports of a burglary in progress, and ends up on a chase through back gardens. After catching one of the suspects, Steve receives a shock when he returns to check out the burgled house.(n)

programme.title: A&E After Dark
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes at Hull Royal Infirmary to show the night-time challenges facing NHS staff working in the A&E department. In the first edition, a 34-year-old man is brought in after having punched his arm through a pub window. Handcuffed and accompanied by four police officers, his behaviour has medical staff fearing for the wellbeing of other patients. Matron Kat Henry deals with a flirtatious patient who has cut his head after a night out on the town and is determined to leave the hospital without treatment.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Max and Steve head to London to try to recover more than £21,000 in unpaid court costs after a car accident. Officers Aron and Cona team up to recover almost £7,000 owed after a debtor failed to repay a loan to her ex-partners.(n)

programme.title: Three Days to Kill (2014)
programme.desc: A CIA agent learns he is dying, and decides to quit the agency so he can spend his last few months trying to rebuild his relationship with his estranged daughter. He is tempted to go back on his word when an old colleague offers him an experimental drug that could save his life - if he agrees to carry out one last mission. Action thriller, starring Kevin Costner, Amber Heard and Hailee Steinfeld.(n)

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip.(n)

programme.title: A Dog's Purpose (2017)
programme.desc: A dog is reincarnated as different breeds over several generations, with multiple owners and with a variety of names, but he is fated to be reacquainted, decades later, with his original owner. Comedy drama, starring Dennis Quaid, with the voice of Josh Gad.(n)

programme.title: Fantastic Voyage (1966)
programme.desc: A medical team is miniaturised and injected into the bloodstream of a scientist to repair his severely damaged brain - unaware that one of the microscopic passengers has sabotage on his mind. Richard Fleischer's sci-fi adventure, starring Raquel Welch, Stephen Boyd, Donald Pleasence and Edmond O'Brien.(n)

programme.title: Ice Age: Collision Course (2016)
programme.desc: When a cosmic blunder leaves Earth in the path of an asteroid, it's up to Sid the sloth and pals Manny and Diego to save the day. Animated sequel, with the voices of Ray Romano, Denis Leary, John Leguizamo and Simon Pegg.(n)

programme.title: The Last Airbender (2010)
programme.desc: A chosen one with mastery of the four elements is charged with keeping the peace between four nations. When he disappears while still a boy, one of these factions sees a chance to gain absolute power and wages war on the others. After 100 years, the chosen one is found and must find a way to restore harmony. Fantasy adventure based on the cartoon series, starring Noah Ringer and Dev Patel.(n)

programme.title: Super 8 (2011)
programme.desc: A boy and his friends sneak out at night to film an amateur zombie movie, only to witness a train derailment. As people start disappearing from their town and the military descends in force, they come to realise a dangerous alien was being transported on the train and is now on the loose. Sci-fi thriller, starring Joel Courtney and Elle Fanning.(n)

programme.title: The Railway Man (2013)
programme.desc: A traumatised former prisoner of war gets married, but continues to suffer nightmares about his experiences. He is unable to talk to his wife about his time in captivity, so she tracks down a fellow hostage to learn the truth - and discovers the cruel Japanese officer he is fixated on is still alive. Fact-based drama, starring Colin Firth, Nicole Kidman and Stellan Skarsgard.(n)

programme.title: The Raid 2 (2014)
programme.desc: A cop who survived fighting his way through a drug lord's lair is reassigned to undercover duties. He is sent to infiltrate a crime syndicate and expose a connection between the gangsters and corruption on the force, but his personal vendetta threatens to disrupt the mission. Action thriller sequel, starring Iko Uwais and Arifin Putra. In Indonesian, Japanese, English and Arabic.(n)

programme.title: The Taking of Deborah Logan (2014)
programme.desc: Deborah, an elderly woman with an aggressive form of Alzheimer's disease, reluctantly agrees to allow a team of film-makers to document her condition. However, when Deborah begins to exhibit behaviours unusual even for someone with her illness, the crew begins to suspect something much more sinister is happening to their subject. Found-footage horror thriller, starring Jill Larson.(n)

programme.title: Crack in the World (1965)
programme.desc: A dying scientist and his colleagues conduct experiments to harness the Earth's inner energy that seem set to end in disaster. Sci-fi thriller, with Dana Andrews, Janette Scott, Kieron Moore and Alexander Knox.(n)

programme.title: Harry and the Hendersons (1987)
programme.desc: A hapless family's camping holiday in the mountains is brought to a sudden end when they accidentally hit the legendary Bigfoot with their car. They decide to adopt the endearing creature, but have more trouble than expected trying to keep him concealed and to avoid arousing their neighbours' suspicions. Comedy, starring John Lithgow, Melinda Dillon, David Suchet, Don Ameche and Kevin Peter Hall.(n)

programme.title: Rio 2 (2014)
programme.desc: Parrots Jewel and Blu lead a happy life together in Rio with their three chicks, until they find themselves hurled into an expedition up the Amazon. The journey leads to an encounter with an old enemy, while Blu also has to win the approval of Jewel's fearsome father. Animated comedy sequel, with the voices of Jesse Eisenberg, Anne Hathaway and Jamie Foxx.(n)

programme.title: 27 Dresses (2008)
programme.desc: Singleton Jane is literally always the bridesmaid and never the bride, a role she assumes for the 28th time when her sister announces she is getting married - to a man Jane is secretly in love with. As she wrestles with her feelings, Jane's predicament attracts the attention of a reporter fascinated by her story. Romantic comedy, starring Katherine Heigl, James Marsden and Malin Akerman.(n)

programme.title: The Simpsons Movie (2007)
programme.desc: Homer unwittingly pollutes Lake Springfield, so the US government decides to isolate the city underneath a giant dome. The Simpsons manage to escape and plan to start a new life in Alaska - but learn Springfield is about to be destroyed, and return to save their friends. With the voices of Dan Castellaneta, Julie Kavner, Nancy Cartwright and Yeardley Smith.(n)

programme.title: The Boss (2016)
programme.desc: A successful entrepreneur is imprisoned for insider trading, losing everything in the process. After her sentence, she sets out to launch a comeback and win back the respect of the nation - but with no one else to turn to, she finds herself a reluctant houseguest of her long-suffering former assistant. Comedy, starring Melissa McCarthy, Kristen Bell and Peter Dinklage.(n)

programme.title: Side Effects (2013)
programme.desc: A psychiatrist prescribes an experimental new drug to a patient suffering from depression, which seems to miraculously resolve her psychological problems. However, it also results in sleepwalking and disturbing personality changes, with consequences that could destroy the doctor's life. Steven Soderbergh's thriller, starring Jude Law, Rooney Mara and Catherine Zeta-Jones.(n)

programme.title: Cosmos (2015)
programme.desc: A student and his friend experience bizarre and disturbing events during their stay at a family-run boarding house. Thriller, starring Jonathan Genet, Johan Libereau and Sabine Azema. In French.(n)

programme.title: Punk Chef on the Road
programme.desc: Chef Scott Garthwaite travels around the UK to find top-quality produce.(n)

programme.title: Hell Below Zero (1954)
programme.desc: A thrill-seeking explorer joins a whaling ship and is persuaded by the female captain to investigate the disappearance of her father on an earlier expedition. The pair become suspicious of her former lover - and are proved right when he leaves them for dead in Antarctic waters. Action adventure, starring Alan Ladd, Joan Tetzel, Basil Sydney and Stanley Baker.(n)

programme.title: A Night to Remember (1958)
programme.desc: Fact-based drama recreating the sinking of the Titanic, told from the point of view of the ship's second officer as he struggles to get as many passengers and crew off the vessel before it sinks. Meanwhile, the captain of a nearby vessel embarks on a doomed rescue mission. Starring Kenneth More, Honor Blackman, Ronald Allen, Tucker McGuire and David McCallum.(n)

programme.title: Hondo (1953)
programme.desc: A hard-boiled cavalry scout with a feral dog as companion stumbles across a woman and her child stranded on their homestead deep inside hostile territory. Despite repeated attacks by the Apaches, they refuse to leave their home, leaving the scout with no choice but to stay and defend her. Western, starring John Wayne, Geraldine Page, Ward Bond and Michael Pate.(n)

programme.title: The Weaker Sex (1948)
programme.desc: A housewife regrets not doing more to help the war effort after the ship her son is serving on is damaged in the D-Day Landings. Drama, starring Ursula Jeans and Thora Hird.(n)

programme.title: Dante's Peak (1997)
programme.desc: A vulcanologist's suspicions that a long-dormant volcano is about to erupt turn out to be true, prompting him to race against time to save the community standing in its way - and clash with local government officials weighing his predictions against the loss in tourism revenue. Disaster movie, starring Pierce Brosnan, Linda Hamilton, Elizabeth Hoffman and Charles Hallahan.(n)

programme.title: Stargate (1994)
programme.desc: An Egyptologist and a soldier head an expedition through a mysterious portal to an alien planet. The world they find resembles ancient Egypt and is under the rule of a tyrant who has convinced the downtrodden inhabitants that he is a god - until the humans incite the enslaved populace to fight back. Sci-fi adventure, starring Kurt Russell, James Spader and Jaye Davidson.(n)

programme.title: The Great Beauty (2013)
programme.desc: A disillusioned writer leads a luxurious life in Rome's high society, but grows increasingly contemptuous of the shallow people who surround him. He wanders the city in search of inspiration, haunted by his own lost youth and past mistakes. Comedy drama, starring Toni Servillo and Carlo Verdone. In Italian, Japanese, Spanish and Chinese.(n)

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Following the collapse of Audrey's cookie business, Jeff is unable to get out of the retail unit lease so he and Adam invent a new game involving the heads of mannequins. Elsewhere, Russell and Timmy go on a double date. Comedy, starring Patrick Warburton and Oliver Hudson.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to floundering soul food restaurant Blackberry's in Plainfield, New Jersey, but struggles to get his message across to indomitable owner Shelley. Her refusal to deal with the truth comes to a head when Gordon finds a dead mouse in the doorway, prompting him to step up his efforts to change her ways.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in New Jersey to help Rose Leone, who spent two years in a coma and came out of hospital to learn her son Michael had run her once-thriving Italian restaurant into the ground. With a menu of more than 126 dishes, the quality of the food is suffering, and even the chefs refuse to eat their own creations.(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Essex groom Gary plans an underwater wedding 200 miles from home, but his bride-to-be Lauren dreams of celebrating her big day in the Home Counties.(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Craig decides to plan an Oktoberfest-themed wedding, but his uncompromising fiancee Sofia dreams of a boho beach wedding day.(n)

programme.title: Horton Hears a Who! (2008)
programme.desc: A kindly elephant hears a cry of help coming from a speck of dust and discovers the minuscule city of Whoville. As he tries to help its citizens, the other animals begin to question his sanity, and the evil Kangaroo incites them to turn against the do-gooder. Animated adaptation of Dr Seuss's book, with the voices of Jim Carrey, Steve Carell, Carol Burnett, Seth Rogen and Will Arnett.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adam picks a team of popular athletes over his own friends in gym class, his mates seek revenge by forcing their opponents to play a game of Dungeons and Dragons. Murray objects when Erica decides that she wants to go away from home to attend college. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Barry insists that Beverly always favours Adam, she tries to make amends by smothering her oldest son with affection - much to his horror. Murray is not happy about Erica's new boyfriend, a fanatical music fan who is trying to convert her to his way of thinking. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry and Erica forget to buy Beverly a Mother's Day gift and make last-minute 'Mom Coupons' instead. Understandably hurt, Beverly gets her revenge by cashing in every coupon they have made in one go. Adam yearns to go to a summer camp for junior astronauts and accuses his father of crushing his dreams when he isn't keen to give permission.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry's favourite shirt is hated by both his mother Beverly and his girlfriend Lainey, so they hatch a plan together to destroy it. However, once the shirt goes missing, Barry asks Adam and Erica to investigate. Murray decides to tear down the family tree house, leaving Adam distraught.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Boyle investigate a serial killer who poses a severe danger to the public. Captain Holt continues to spar with his rival, Commissioner Kelly. Jeffords must deal with some complications resulting from his recent news about his lieutenant's exam.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad members partner up for their next Halloween Heist - unaware they have to be handcuffed to each other. But that is just the start of their problems.(n)

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Rival Prodigy and Sir Isaac Neutron
programme.desc: Meemaw intervenes when Sheldon gets jealous of Dr Sturgis bonding with Paige, a rival 10-year-old genius. In the meantime, Mary invites Paige's family over for a play date.(n)

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Crisis of Faith and Octopus Aliens
programme.desc: Following a tragic accident in the local community, Mary's faith is shaken. Seeing his mother doubt everything she believes, Sheldon becomes an unlikely ally. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage and Zoe Perry.(n)

programme.title: Paddington (2014)
programme.desc: An earthquake forces a bear from the Peruvian jungle to start a new life in London. He finds modern Britain to be very different from the stories told to him by his aunt, but makes a new home with a kindly family. However, a sinister taxidermist intends to turn him into a museum exhibit. Comedy based on Michael Bond's series of children's books, starring Hugh Bonneville, Sally Hawkins and Nicole Kidman, with the voice of Ben Whishaw.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj's parents set him up on a blind date in the hope of initiating an arranged marriage, but after a promising start it becomes apparent that the girl in question is more interested in Sheldon. Meanwhile, Penny begins her new job as a bartender. Starring Kunal Nayyar and Jim Parsons.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon receive an invitation to present their research to a physics conference, but Sheldon's reluctance to pander to his peers causes conflict between the friends. An intervention by Penny makes matters worse. Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons star.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Leonard invent excuses to avoid having to attend Penny's performance in a production of the stage musical Rent, but maintaining the pretence makes matters increasingly complicated. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco star, with DJ Qualls.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon falls ill, and his friends decide to go to a Planet of the Apes movie marathon to keep their distance, knowing he will be in a terrible mood. However, an unsuspecting Penny offers to nurse him. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon feels undermined when his parking space at the university is allocated to Howard instead, and his determination to cling on to the spot causes a rift in the pair's friendship. However, the battle between the boys pales in comparison to that waged by Amy and Bernadette, whose disagreement on behalf of their significant others becomes increasingly personal. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As part of the relationship agreement, Sheldon reluctantly has to take care of Amy when she gets sick, but she loves the extra attention so much she pretends to remain in poor health. Elsewhere, Howard tries to get some tips on manliness from Penny when he and Bernadette go to visit her father.(n)

programme.title: Anchorman 2: The Legend Continues (2013)
programme.desc: Arrogant newsreader Ron Burgundy's career is rescued from a drunken slump by an executive for a new 24-hour news channel. Reassembling his team of sidekicks, he swiftly rises from the network's graveyard to become its biggest star with a run of ludicrously sensationalist broadcasts. Comedy sequel, starring Will Ferrell, Christina Applegate, Paul Rudd and Steve Carell.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox USA
programme.desc: A rolling cast of famous faces in the US critique the week's TV, including Ultimate Tag, 2020 Beverley Hills Dog Show and Deadliest Catch.(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The nation's favourite armchair critics share their opinions on TV from April 2016, including Britain's Got Talent, Caravanner of the Year, Marcella, The Island with Bear Grylls, Horizon: Should We Close Our Zoos?, University Challenge, The Fearless Chef and the news.(n)

programme.title: First Dates
programme.sub-title: First Dates: Celebrity Special for SU2C
programme.desc: The show' restaurant opens its doors for a special episode in aid of Stand Up to Cancer, with maitre d' Fred and his team welcoming hopeful single people from across the country who are unaware that some of the dinner dates will be famous faces, including Jorgie Porter, Jamie Laing and Anthea Turner. Those hoping to meet the person of their dreams include Swiss-born neuroscience student Sophie, personal trainer Craig and part-time model Louis. Plus, 54-year-old hairdresser and model Gary hopes to meet a man with 'va-va-voom'.(n)

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Maitre d' Fred hosts a special festive party in which he welcomes back some of the couples who found love in the restaurant, as well as three unlucky daters returning for a second chance at romance. Supermarket worker Luke, fireman Paul and eccentric theology student Louisa are all determined not to be left alone under the mistletoe by the end of the night, while the successful pairings are all happy to be back at the place they found love - and when one of the lovers surprises their partner by getting down on one knee, it makes it a Christmas they will never forget.(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Essex groom Gary plans an underwater wedding 200 miles from home, but his bride-to-be Lauren dreams of celebrating her big day in the Home Counties.(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Craig decides to plan an Oktoberfest-themed wedding, but his uncompromising fiancee Sofia dreams of a boho beach wedding day.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: First of a two-part special in which Gordon Ramsay heads to the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions are running high because owner Alan Saffron has spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. To make matters worse, the kitchen is run by a chef called David Blaine who shares nothing of his famous namesake's magic when it comes to cooking - and whose threatening behaviour regularly gets him into trouble.(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Bride-to-be Anna has always dreamed of getting married in the family church in Norfolk, but her fiance Lee decides to plan a Vegas-themed wedding.(n)

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Alex Mytton and Liv Bentley rewind to 2016 for this classic episode, where the gang are turning up the heat in the South of France.(n)

programme.title: The House of Magic (2013)
programme.desc: A stray cat wanders into a magician's mansion, and finds it is full of strange gadgets. The illusionist allows him to stay, to the annoyance of his other pets, but the cat proves an invaluable addition to the group when their owner's scheming nephew plots to take the house for himself. Animated adventure, with the voices of Murray Blue and Doug Stone.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: First to host this week is Anthea Turner, whose guests are Love Island star Marcel Somerville, comedian Amelia Dimoldenberg, and TV presenters AJ Odudu and Dave Benson Phillips.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Marcel Somerville of Blazin' Squad and Love Island fame hosts tonight's dinner party, but misjudges his main course and comes in for some tough questions about his reality TV past.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Comedian and writer Amelia Dimoldenberg hosts the third dinner party of the week, hoping to impress her guests with a selection of her favourite dishes.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dave Benson Phillips' food gets a grilling from Anthea Turner, Marcel Somerville, Amelia Dimoldenberg and AJ Odudu, so he tries to save his evening with a spot of clowning around.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: TV presenter AJ Odudu plans to wow the fellow celebs with a menu from her Nigerian-Lancashire roots in the hope of bagging the grand for charity. Cue some are biscuit comparisons and the group members discovering each other's worst childhood moments - with celeb coming clean about their prized collection of photos that got them in big trouble and another declaring they weren't always a goody-two-shoes.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry and Erica forget to buy Beverly a Mother's Day gift and make last-minute 'Mom Coupons' instead. Understandably hurt, Beverly gets her revenge by cashing in every coupon they have made in one go. Adam yearns to go to a summer camp for junior astronauts and accuses his father of crushing his dreams when he isn't keen to give permission.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry's favourite shirt is hated by both his mother Beverly and his girlfriend Lainey, so they hatch a plan together to destroy it. However, once the shirt goes missing, Barry asks Adam and Erica to investigate. Murray decides to tear down the family tree house, leaving Adam distraught.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon feels threatened by a 15-year-old physics prodigy who is even cleverer than he is, and asks Leonard to help him discredit the precocious teenager's research. Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons star.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Raj and Howard kick Sheldon off their physics quiz team and replace him with Leslie Winkle, so he decides to prove his superiority by forming a rival quartet of his own. Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons star.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny makes fun of Leonard's habit of collecting sci-fi memorabilia, so he decides to give it up - but his friends object and do everything possible to persuade him not to change his ways. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's friends all fall for his sexy twin sister, who is paying him a visit, but he declares he will have the final say on who can date her - an announcement that particularly dismays Leonard. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny finds out Leonard's family never celebrated his birthdays, so she enlists Sheldon's help to organise a surprise party, while Howard gets him out of the way by staging an emergency hospital visit. Kaley Cuoco and Johnny Galecki star.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Following the break-up of Penny's relationship, Leonard finally summons up the courage to ask her out. When she accepts, they both turn to Sheldon for advice on how to handle the forthcoming date. Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons star.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon finds himself forced to keep a secret when Penny decides to tell him what happened on her disappointing first date with Leonard. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is dejected to see Penny with another man and decides to cut his losses by going back to fellow scientist Leslie Winkle - a move that upsets Sheldon. Starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Sara Gilbert.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny struggles with Leonard's confession that he kissed another woman when he was away on his North Sea research expedition. After driving all the way to Las Vegas, she must now decide whether she wants to go through with the wedding. Back home, Sheldon doesn't know how to act after Amy tells him she wants them to take a relationship break.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard meets up with the woman he kissed during his trip in the hope of setting Penny's mind at ease, while Sheldon films a special episode of Fun with Flags after his break-up with Amy. Bernadette feels guilty about keeping a secret from Penny.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys' science skills are put to the test when they get a flat tyre during Leonard's surprise bachelor party weekend in Mexico. Meanwhile, the girls finally force Penny to break the news to her family that she has eloped with Leonard. Keith Carradine guest stars.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny and Leonard announce that they are moving in together, prompting Sheldon to revisit 2003, a much simpler time before he had met either of them. Howard and Raj form a band to play at the comic-book store, only to fall out over musical differences.(n)

programme.title: Batwoman
programme.desc: On the Kane sisters' birthday, Kate and Alice contend with demons from the past, and an unexpected guest makes a surprise appearance in Gotham.(n)

programme.title: Misfits
programme.desc: Sally turns her attention to Simon as her investigation into Tony's disappearance continues, and he begins to fall for her as she gets closer to discovering the truth. With the clock ticking until Alisha finds out about them, Curtis has difficulty ending his relationship with Sam, and Nathan finds a baby at the Community Centre. Comedy drama, starring Lauren Socha and Iwan Rheon.(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Twenty six-year-old psychology student Alesia is tired of meeting 'boys' and is now seeking someone more emotionally mature than her previous partners. Next up is Louise from London, who has travelled the world and been on over 200 dates, but is still no closer to finding her soul mate. Anna Richardson assists both singletons, inviting them to choose their favourite partner from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time until fully nude. The contenders then don their glad rags to enjoy a date together.(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Twenty-year-old virgin Josh hopes to find a fairy-tale princess to remove his innocence, while twentysomething Manchester couple Matt and Mary are interested in exploring the possibilities of polyamory and finding a third person to join their relationship. However, with two people doing the picking, will they ever be able to agree on who to date?(n)

programme.title: Supernatural
programme.desc: Michael has retaken control of Dean as his monsters continues to move in on the heroes. Sam devises a plan to try to reach Dean and stop Michael before anyone else has to die.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny becomes addicted to an online game based on the world of Conan the Barbarian. As her obsession intensifies, she begins to neglect her friends and seeks the company of the usually snide Sheldon, whom she continually pesters for advice. Starring Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Elated at being named one of People magazine's '30 to Watch Under 30', Raj makes a pass at Penny and becomes very arrogant, making it hard for Leonard to maintain a positive perspective on his friend's new-found confidence. Guest starring Charlie Sheen.(n)

programme.desc: Sabrina receives an unexpected surprise on her birthday. Roxie has a special guest over for dinner. S06 Ep10.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina awaits an important message regarding a job at a local newspaper, but unfortunately her evil twin from the Other Realm has cluttered her inbox with junk e-mails. Cheers' George Wendt guest stars.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe is forced to quickly make a decision that could affect his and Mel's marriage after his new wife drops a bombshell at the ceremony. Meanwhile, Lennox is caught between Zander and Marco, and Ryder struggles to find the right time to make an announcement about college.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Still reeling from the unexpected news at the wedding, Joe issues an impulsive invitation without consulting Mel first, putting their new life together in jeopardy. Ryder takes an online course, and Zander tries to win back Lennox - but Marco has already decided to make a commitment to her. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben's rooftop beach gets shut down by Sondra, the president of the board of the apartment building, so he plans to overthrow her and do the job himself. Meanwhile, Bonnie and Riley go on a double date with Brad and his twin brother Tad.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben arranges to meet up with a woman whose phone he has found, however when he ends up running late the father has to send Tucker in his place. Meanwhile, Riley enlists Danny to help her take revenge on an old rival, and Bonnie creates a new business slogan. Comedy series, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy tries to help Sheldon get over his desire for closure when one of his favourite TV shows is cancelled on a cliffhanger ending. Raj discovers his new girlfriend Lucy has a blog in which she has written about him, and is upset when he learns she believes he has feminine qualities, causing him to worry about their relationship.(n)

Meanwhile, Raj asks Howard and Bernadette to look after his dog for the weekend, but the couple panic when the canine goes missing. Guest starring Bob Newhart.(n)
