programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta is in danger of losing his flat but has no money to buy his own place, so Gina does her best to find him a new home. Holt and Jeffords organise self-evaluations for all the staff at the precinct, while Boyle helps Diaz to take revenge on one of the weekend squad officers who always makes a mess of her desk.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta tries to set a new record on a training course, Diaz does not receive an invitation to Boyle's wedding, and Holt becomes addicted to a game application on his smartphone. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard isn't thrilled when he finds out Penny is considering taking a new job that has been offered to her by her former boyfriend Zack. Sheldon attempts to develop his brain further by learning new skills.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is offered a visiting research fellowship at Princeton University, and Raj makes some new living arrangements. When the guys complete their infinite persistence gyroscope project, events spin out of control.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe puts a ban on the use of all mobiles and computers over the weekend in the hope of improving communication within the family. However, he soon comes to regret his decision when he is offered a new job and needs to get back to his prospective employer in time to accept the post.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe is furious when he finds out that Dani had some older friends over to the house who drank his expensive bottle of wine, but wonders whether she is being totally honest with him about the event. When Lennox expresses admiration for her college professor Evita, Mel grows jealous of their relationship, until Evita asks to interview Mel for her latest research project. Shalita Grant guest stars alongside Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Now that she knows the truth about Margot, Riley decides to look for her biological father too, and uses her parents' high-school yearbook as a guide. With a little help from Ben, she narrows down the possible candidates to an easy-going pastry chef and a high-flying lawyer. Comedy, starring Chelsea Kane and Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Riley looks forward to meeting Philip's sister when she visits from England, but her excitement vanishes when it becomes clear his sibling is unimpressed with his taste in girlfriends. Meanwhile, Danny's contract negotiations with the Rangers are put in jeopardy. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta hits it off with Sophia, a woman he meets in a bar, only to find out she is the defence attorney representing a perpetrator he is trying to put behind bars. Diaz pressures Santiago to stand as a union rep, while Gina and Boyle try to move on from their relationship. Eva Longoria (best known as Desperate Housewives' Gaby) joins the cast.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The precinct goes into lockdown on Thanksgiving when a mysterious powder-filled package is delivered to the building. Peralta, who has been left in charge while Holt and Jeffords are out of the office, is confident he can keep morale high and avoid any chaos - but things soon spiral out of control.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry makes fun of Adam for taking part in a school musical production, but when he finds out that Adam and Lainey have been cast in roles that require them to kiss, he tries to sabotage it by joining the stage crew. Meanwhile, substitute teacher Beverly causes chaos in Erica's class. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adam creates a video that makes it look as though he and his friends beat Barry in a game of basketball, Barry demands a rematch in the school gym. Beverly tries to throw a 'surprise' party for Murray's 50th birthday, despite his objections to the idea.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Howard are furious when they learn that Sheldon went to work with the military behind their backs. Angered, the pair ask Kripke to help them get their own back on Sheldon, much to his annoyance. Meanwhile, Bernadette suspects that Ruchi might be trying to steal her job while she is on bed rest, so she asks Raj to investigate for her, putting him in a very awkward position. Dean Norris guest stars.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys find a laptop that has some virtual currency on it. The only snag is, the computer belongs to Penny's ex-boyfriend Zack. Meanwhile, a seven-year-old video reveals a secret about Leonard and Penny's relationship.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Detective Jake Peralta and his eclectic group of colleagues at Brooklyn's 99th Precinct are used to having a commanding officer who doesn't make them work too hard or follow the rules too closely. That all changes when tightly wound Captain Ray Holt takes over, determined to make the dysfunctional squad into the best in the borough. Pilot episode of the American comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher.(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom Billy plans a pig-themed wedding, complete with a world record pig parade, but his prim and proper bride Steph may not be pleased with his decision.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity SAS: Who Dares Wins
programme.sub-title: Celebrity SAS: Who Dares Wins for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Twelve famous faces undergo special forces training in the Chilean Andes with Ant Middleton for this special charity event, which begins with a backwards dive out of a helicopter. The first round of challenges include two-versus-one boxing, and one of the recruits is forced to confront their troubled past.(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts the show in which potential dates bare all bit by bit in a bid to prove they are the one. First up is 30-year-old woman Emmy-Lou from Brighton, who has appeared on the show twice before, both times in the pod. Now she is back as the picker, unaware she is in for a big surprise. She is followed by 20-year-old Charlie from Oxford, a forensics student who hopes to find his ideal partner in crime.(n)

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Teenager Buffy Summers moves to the town of Sunnydale, where she hopes to put her destiny of single-handedly fighting the forces of darkness behind her - only to find her new home town is crawling with vampires. Supernatural drama, starring Sarah Michelle Gellar and Nicholas Brendon.(n)

programme.title: River Cottage Bites
programme.desc: Head gardener Mark Diacono provides a step-by-step guide to planning a vegetable patch, and shows how people can save money by growing their own produce, expanding their culinary horizons and providing the freshest produce around.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Graham and Dawn Tucker love the beautiful Italian region of Le Marche and want to buy a perfect home from home there. With a budget of £160,000, Sara Damergi searches every nook and cranny of the local property market to help the couple find their ideal retreat.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Long-time friends Jackie Venn and Jane Howes adore Italy and have pooled together all their savings seeking a renovation project in the region of Abruzzo. They want a substantial property offering views, olive trees and a layout that suits their different needs, so turn to property expert Sara Damergi to help them achieve their objectives.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Scarlette Douglas comes to the aid of Neil Masey and Affy Wajid, a Brighton-based couple seeking to pick up a holiday home on Ibiza. The pair hope that setting up house will allow them to enjoy the island's party lifestyle, while also having a place where they can entertain friends and begin their explorations of the Mediterranean landscape.(n)

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer search Hampshire, Wiltshire and Surrey as they try to find homes for this week's couples. Retirees Sheila and Jason are living out of boxes after selling their home in Morecambe and now they just want to be nearer their families, while Sue and Alan have moved back from Australia, only to find their generous budget of £450,000 does not stretch to the spacious apartment they had Down Under - and getting them to downsize could prove an uphill struggle for Phil.(n)

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.sub-title: Miniature Classics and a Towering Retro FavouriteMiniature Classics and a Towering Retro Favourite
programme.desc: Liam Charles and Tom Allen present 12 professional duos with two challenges. For the first round, they must produce two different types of miniature classics - strawberry tarts and fruit salad. For the second challenge, they must reinvent pineapple upside-down cake and transform it into an incredible fine-dining experience, complete with towering edible showpiece sculptures.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Marlon Williams hosts the first party in Oxford, and hopes his love-island-themed evening will be enough to win him the £1,000 prize at the end of the week. However, after a shambolic start to proceedings, the night ends with the smashing of plates.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Inventor Richard Berrecloth hosts the second dinner party in Oxford, and hopes to impress his guests with home-made food and an unusual form of entertainment. However, Heidi Kelloway and Marlon Williams appear to be more interested in each other than their host's hospitality - while another diner seems rather too keen on sampling the wine.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Mother-of-three Victoria Collett hosts the third dinner party in Oxford and begins the day with a hangover and a few culinary disasters. It is not long before her guests start grumbling and Richard Berrecloth criticises her seafood starter, so she pins her hopes on the Caribbean curry being a success.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dog trainer James Hearle hosts the fourth dinner party in Oxford, but his four-legged friends threaten to turn the evening into a mess. Tempers also rise between the guests as culinary critic Richard Berrecloth continues shocking the group with his brutal honesty.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Heidi Kelloway hosts the final dinner party in Oxford, determined to lighten the mood of the other diners. However, the evening turns sour when the diners confront the overly critical Richard Berrecloth about his frank comments, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Owner Helen Marriott offers her guest a chance to 'step off the planet' and treats them to essential breathing lessons, a chance to get to know one another in the hot tub, and soul-soothing foot massages at the Fountains Court Holistic Health Hotel in the North Yorkshire resort of Scarborough.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants head to the Whittington & Cat, a pub in Hull that also offers B&B. Proprietor Sue Perkins treats her guests to an afternoon of ice hockey, but they are intrigued by the possible contents of her peculiarly titled breakfast menu.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Khurram Saba hosts the third night of the competition at his Saba Hotel in west London and finds his guests are expecting metropolitan chic, and certainly not fish and chips for dinner. Candida Leaver is extremely displeased when she experiences a sleepless night, while Sue Perkins and Gill take the opportunity to go out and have some fun.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Candida Leaver and Peter Starling, owners of the Bower Inn in Bridgwater, Somerset, play host in the last round of the week. The group activity is willow-weaving, and at dinner time the guests reveal what they think of their no-nonsense hosts.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the week's competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table.(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows a project by artists Freddie Robins and Ben Coode-Adams to convert a large, Grade II-listed timber-framed barn in Essex into a family home and workspace. Their plans involve a minimal number of interior walls to display their collection of toys, but at seven times the size of an average three-bedroom house, the transformation of the 500-year-old building proves extremely challenging.(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Staff and patients at St George's in south west London talk about the importance of family support when dealing with difficult circumstances. Fifty-one-year-old painter and decorator Gary is rushed to St George's after falling 10 feet from a ladder. Cameras also follow five-year-old Beatriz, who has symptoms of a fever. She has a rare kidney condition that affects her immune system, making her vulnerable to infection.(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Forty-year-old Adrian crashed his bike into a car and may have a serious chest injury requiring emergency surgery, so he makes a heartfelt phone call to his wife Lili - who is 1,400 miles away in Montenegro. Meanwhile, Steve, 49, was encouraged to go to A&E by his wife Julia when his heart rate more than doubled in an hour while preparing supper, and doctors try to determine whether his accelerated heart is connected to his recent stroke and whether he is at risk of having another.(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Dougal takes over as Craggy Island's new milkman, but his predecessor, local womaniser Pat Mustard, returns to exact an explosive revenge on Ted for getting him sacked. Starring Ardal O'Hanlon and Dermot Morgan.(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Dougal and Ted visit the mainland, where they bump into actor Richard Wilson - and discover the hard way that he does not take kindly to being confused with his comic alter ego Victor Meldrew. Dermot Morgan and Ardal O'Hanlon star.(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz, as Jon Richardson and Michelle Wolf take on guest captain Jonathan Ross with Johnny Vegas. Three-man comedy act Pappy's joins Countdown's resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner and Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters.(n)

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp learns how to create a flower arrangement for the petite category at the Royal Cornwall Show, under the instruction of master florist Sioned Rowlands.(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw restore a 1941 Austin 10 utility truck owned by a former soldier who has used it as an all-purpose vehicle on his farm.(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw secretly restore a 1992 Mazda RX-7, a Japanese sports car with an unusual rotary engine belonging to a charity worker with a degenerative eye condition.(n)

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend get help from actor James Nesbitt as they try to fix up a 1959 MG MGA sports car that has been kept in a damp barn for more than 40 years.(n)

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help two sets of house-hunters looking for homes in Yorkshire. Kate works in international development and has spent years in Africa and elsewhere around the globe. Now she wants to put down roots and has chosen the picturesque Yorkshire Dales. In nearby Leeds, perfectionist couple Charley and Hayley have spent nine months trying to clinch a deal on their first home, terrified of making the wrong decision. Can Kirstie and Phil help them both find what they're looking for?(n)

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp comes to the aid of friends friends Sam and Michael, who want to move to east London and are pooling their resources in the hope of getting a shared house together. Phil Spencer helps London-born Nishita, who is aiming to make an investment that will help her with her long-term goal of quitting her job and making a living as a yoga teacher.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to Spain, where Ben Eyre and Anna Chalu are first to host at Vista Del Torcal in the Andalusian Mountains. Despite being impressed with their rooms, some guests are less enthused by an afternoon of rock climbing, leaving Ben and Anna hoping a full English breakfast will save their bacon.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jed and Mandy Filmer welcome their rivals to the Hotel la Tartana on Spain's Costa Tropical, and hope to impress them with a cookery class - not realising one of their guests is a qualified chef. A revelation at dinner stuns the group, before the Filmers' attitude to breakfast service jeopardises their chances of victory.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Julia Grant hosts the third round of the competition in Spain at her Benidorm B&B The Queens Hotel. Her guests are not impressed with her standards of cleanliness, finding dirt, dust and hairs, and tensions rise at dinner over her 'straight-friendly' label. The owner improves the evening by giving everyone a drag makeover and persuading them to perform in a revue, but some of the feedback she receives leaves her enraged.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The week's final hosts in Spain are Alastair Smith and Martyn Watson, owners of the gay and naturist-friendly Almond Tree Villa in Murcia. The day's activity is olive picking, but the mood turns sour when Jed admits he gave Julia's hotel low marks, while a disaster in the bathroom and a sugar-rich continental breakfast reflect badly on Alastair and Martyn's feedback scores.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants of the Spanish special meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the week's competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Make-up artist Craig Alexander Wilson hosts the first party in Glasgow, hoping his edible glitter and sparklers will impress his fellow diners. However, his guests are less than overawed when he tries to guess their ages, hampering his chances of winning the £1,000 prize at the end of the week.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Paul Cowan hosts the second dinner party in Glasgow, but his penchant for practical jokes threatens to overshadow his menu, which includes steak Balmoral with whisky sauce and the enigmatically named Paul's Cream Puff.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Mandy Wong hopes to impress her guests at the third dinner party in Glasgow with an Asian cuisine-inspired menu. Unfortunately for her, Caroline Wardrope has to run to the bathroom during the host's Latin dance routine, and a disastrous dessert further hampers her bid for success.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Music teacher and professional flautist Siobhan Daly hosts the fourth dinner party challenge in Glasgow, and plans to impress her guests with a rock and pop icons-themed evening. She begins by preparing a cod and chorizo stew before showing off her piano skills for dessert.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Caroline Wardrope hosts the final dinner party in Glasgow, and throws a 1970s-themed disco evening with a mystery menu. The diners seem to enjoy the surprise dishes and are shocked to learn the truth about the host's secret profession, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced.(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Tim and Philomena O'Donovan, who are trying to convert the old lifeboat station in Tenby, Pembrokeshire, into a contemporary home and preserve the historic building for posterity. A weather-worn, rusting and rotting hulk that was never designed for habitation, it is perched on a steel pier 40ft above the sea and can only be reached by crossing the sandy beach at low tide.(n)

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedic Rob Moore and technician Chloe Walker rush to a GP surgery, where a 19-year-old woman has suspected meningitis and sepsis.(n)

programme.title: Inside Birmingham Children's Hospital
programme.desc: Documentary exploring how treatments at Birmingham Children's Hospital affect patients and their families, including the story of Rosie, a four-year-old with leukaemia. Her dad Chris has put normal life on hold to become her full-time carer as he and her mum Jenny do everything they can to help Rosie in her fight to get better and start walking again.(n)

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: Documentary following the emergency services in Wiltshire, continuing with crimes relating to the rising use of cannabis. PC Joe Tompkinson is cut up at a roundabout and when he stops the car responsible, all he can smell is the drug. PC Adam Burson visits a family whose members have had a brick thrown through their front window - a dealer's retaliation - and officers are called by a mother after she is assaulted by her son, who is suspected to be suffering from cannabis psychosis.(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Doctors treat a young woman who has been thrown from a horse, which then trampled on her, and also a woman who was hit by a car while riding her motorbike on a dual carriageway. An 11-year-old boy is brought into hospital after running into a wall at school and hurting his wrist.(n)

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedic Rob Moore and technician Chloe Walker rush to a GP surgery, where a 19-year-old woman has suspected meningitis and sepsis.(n)

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: Documentary following the emergency services in Wiltshire, continuing with crimes relating to the rising use of cannabis. PC Joe Tompkinson is cut up at a roundabout and when he stops the car responsible, all he can smell is the drug. PC Adam Burson visits a family whose members have had a brick thrown through their front window - a dealer's retaliation - and officers are called by a mother after she is assaulted by her son, who is suspected to be suffering from cannabis psychosis.(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Dougal and Ted visit the mainland, where they bump into actor Richard Wilson - and discover the hard way that he does not take kindly to being confused with his comic alter ego Victor Meldrew. Dermot Morgan and Ardal O'Hanlon star.(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty visits Italy to assess why Parmesan costs up to twice as much as supermarket cheddar and Kate Quilton travels to Hungary and Spain to find out exactly where paprika comes from. Plus, Matt Tebbutt looks at the best and quickest ways to remove the shell from a hard-boiled egg.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Property expert Laura Hamilton helps Rodney and Lynda Palliser from Hertfordshire search for their dream holiday home near the upmarket, cosmopolitan city of Palma - the capital of Majorca - on a budget of £100,000.(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Max McMurdo and Henry Cole visit a motorbike fan, making table lamps from engines and turning a pallet and iron wheels into a stylish modern coffee table.(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head east to Newark in search of their latest upcycling prospects. Simon finds an antique European threshing board, which he turns into a coffee table, and Henry's all at sea with a ship's porthole.(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Wendy and Marcus aim to finish their newly renovated wedding barn for a VIP visit from the local mayor. In the Ardèche, chateau owners Amy and Marc have big plans to turn two of their outbuildings into a yoga studio and café to kick-start their fledgling business of running a restorative retreat centre. Meanwhile, Belinda and Lee's hopes of giving their donjon a much-needed facelift start to fade as a concrete delivery fails to work upon arrival.(n)

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton catches up with a Leicestershire couple previously featured on the show to see how their plan to build a four-bed place in their garden has progressed two years on.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Another quartet of B&B owners battle it out to decide which of their establishments provides the best value for money, beginning with Paul Billington and Flora Loizou from Silverwood Lodge in Cambridgeshire. The couple get a frosty response when one guest learns her hosts do not live on-site, while another is left in hysterics by an unexpected discovery.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The group sets off for Great Yarmouth to stay in Sue Dodd's dog-friendly Seashells Guesthouse. Spirits run high with a trip to the beach and a game of bingo, but Nancy's complaints over dog hairs on the sheets and smoking in the rooms bring down the light-hearted mood during dinner.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: American ex-banker Nancy Hampson hosts at the Old Court Guesthouse in Bath, but her vocal criticisms of the week's first two establishments have made her no friends among her fellow competitors. Paul Billington is annoyed that the bed he and wife Flora Loizou are given is not big enough, but is more impressed when taken for food at a quirky local restaurant.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests stay with Caroline Scott, the owner of the Dean B&B near Longniddry, East Lothian The picturesque house and breathtaking views across the Firth of Forth win everyone over, but underwear in the drawers, cobwebs on the curtains and a messy breakfast service seriously hamper the host's chances of success.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Sue from Seashells in Great Yarmouth confronts Nancy Hampson about the controversial topic of smoking in bedrooms, while Paul Billington and Flora Loizou are held to account about their low mark for the Old Court Guesthouse.(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien search for more items to fix up and sell on, visiting a Norman castle, restoring a Fiat 500 and making a table from part of Southend pier.(n)

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: An edition from May 2018, with Nick Hewer and Rachel Riley presenting the words-and-numbers game, and Adrian Chiles joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner.(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Wendy and Marcus give the barn a last-minute makeover for a steampunk-themed wedding vow renewal. Loire Valley chateau owners Ben and Billie build a pontoon for their glamping site.(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets estate manager Ed Waghorn and his wife Rowena, a couple living an almost self-sufficient life with their four children on a smallholding in Herefordshire. They have been constructing a timber-framed house using recycled materials, wood from nearby forests and stone from around the site, but as construction becomes a way of life for Ed, they seem to have lost sight of their goal.(n)

programme.title: Secret History
programme.sub-title: The Dambusters' Great Escape: Secret History
programme.desc: Dubbed 'The Beast' by Winston Churchill, Tirpitz was Nazi Germany's most powerful battleship. Protected by an elite squadron of fighters, it was seen as invincible, but after 34 failed attempts to sink it, the RAF sent in the 617 'Dambusters' Squadron and 9 Squadron. In a raid in November 1944 they managed to slip through enemy defences and destroy Tirpitz. With eyewitness accounts from surviving RAF crew, one of the Luftwaffe fighter pilots and German sailors, this documentary tells this extraordinary story and offers new evidence to explain the mission's improbable success.(n)

programme.title: Nazi Megastructures
programme.desc: How the German army prepared for the D-Day landings, despite having no evidence of exactly where in Europe the Allied forces planned to attack.(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show's version of the words-and-numbers quiz, with Jon Richardson and James Acaster teaming up against Lee Mack and Sarah Millican. John Cooper Clarke is in Dictionary Corner with Susie Dent, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters.(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home.(n)

programme.title: The Hurting
programme.desc: Clip show featuring the voice of Jake Yapp, as home videos reveal the dumbest things attempted by adults, kids and even animals.(n)

programme.title: The Hurting

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Matt LeBlanc and Chris Harris go to Norway to test drive the latest estate cars from Porsche and Ferrari, while Rory Reid is joined by racing driver Sabine Schmitz for an unusual motoring challenge - to create Britain's newest mountain with the help of a tiny Suzuki. The team is joined in the studio by Westworld star James Marsden.(n)

programme.title: Rick Stein's French Odyssey
programme.desc: The chef journeys along the Etang de Thau, famous for its oysters and mussels, before mooring his barge in the port of Sete, where Bastille Day is being celebrated. He also rustles up seafood ragout and roast black bream before travelling on to Marseille to tackle the most famous fish dish of all - bouillabaisse.(n)

programme.title: Rick Stein's French Odyssey
programme.desc: The chef's epic journey from the Atlantic to the Mediterranean comes to an end as he takes the final leg of his gastronomic tour along the canal systems of southern France. Arriving in Marseille, he samples seafood and regional cuisine, as well as showing a variety of traditional recipes. He also cooks roast black bream and finds time to send Chalky a postcard.(n)

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys visit a museum in Louisiana dedicated to Bonnie and Clyde, and examine a roadie's collection of valuable rock memorabilia.(n)

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys find a replica spaceship during a picking trip in Louisiana, and Mike employs some new negotiating tactics to get a suitable price.(n)

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: A monster scares the bidders, while Brandon and Lori bet big on a DJ's equipment.(n)

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: The bargain hunters head to an airport auction and compete for luggage and plane parts.(n)

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Brandon and Jesse are forced to team up and help each other to gamble on a once-in-a-lifetime locker.(n)

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Brandon and Lori are torn between what could be a massive haul courtesy of a studio props supplier, and an auction across town.(n)

programme.title: Border Force: America's Gatekeepers
programme.desc: A refugee from war-torn Venezuela tells officers how she paid human traffickers to smuggle her through Central America and to the Mexico-United States border. In Laredo, an American couple caught smuggling methamphetamine inside cans of vegetables crumble while being questioned and give officers information about a chain of so-called 'stash houses' where drugs and illegal immigrants are being kept.(n)

programme.title: Eddie Eats America
programme.desc: Eddie Hall, winner of the 2017 World's Strongest Man contest, tours the USA on a quest to conquer the biggest and best eye-watering food and physical challenges. Eddie lands in Florida Keys to attempt a conch-fritter eating record, do some serious big-game fishing and try what's billed as the best Key Lime Pie on earth.(n)

programme.title: Eddie Eats America
programme.desc: Eddie Hall squares up to the Mac & Cheese Challenge at Brooklyn's Mac Shack - which weighs in at more than two kilograms and nearly 7,000 calories of pasta, cheese and sauce.(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May head to the countryside where they harness a group of hi-tech tractors and try to cultivate their own source of fuel. Meanwhile, the Lamborghini Murcielago LP640 is put through its paces, and actress Kristin Scott Thomas is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car.(n)

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May build their own stretch limousines out of other vehicles and use them to transport celebrities to the Brit Awards. Meanwhile, a Ford Mustang is put through its paces, and actress Billie Piper is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car.(n)

programme.title: Room 101
programme.desc: Frank Skinner invites boxer Nicola Adams, comedian Frankie Boyle and comedy actress Diane Morgan to express their anger over individuals, events and objects that upset them, hoping to curry the host's favour and see them consigned to oblivion. Their gripes include magicians, losing one's keys and life itself.(n)

programme.title: Room 101
programme.desc: Grumpy comic Jack Dee, footballer-turned-presenter Gary Lineker and actress Fay Ripley reveal their pet hates to Frank Skinner in the hope he will banish them to Room 101. Things that really get on the guests' nerves this week include white-van drivers, competitive parents and people who tell the truth.(n)

programme.title: Room 101
programme.desc: Outdoor survival expert Ray Mears, TV presenter Fiona Bruce and comedienne Katherine Ryan tell Frank Skinner what really gets on their wick, in the hope he will banish their bugbears to the infamous room for ever. The celebrities' gripes include caravans, cushions on beds and Cheryl.(n)

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee Mack's not having much luck with lights these days, whether it's the fizzling sign at the start of this show, the blackout during his recent Sheffield gig, or the dimly lit area at the start of this seventh series. Lee and Lucy have enjoyed a spot of culture at their local cinema, but the sparkle of a French movie is soon diminished when the romantic walk home finds them in an imposing underpass. She has her handbag stolen by a bunch of cocky youths from under his nose. Given the fact the layabout failed to protect her, or come up with an accurate description of their muggers, Lee feels the urge to prove his manliness, but will a spell at the local boxing ring be a help or a hindrance? Sally Bretton and Katy Wix also star.(n)

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: A wealthy new couple move into the block and soon find out that sharing a building with Lee and Lucy is anything but straightforward. The fun begins when Lee somehow manages to bag an invitation to a christening party being thrown by the couple - sending him and Lucy on a last-minute gift-buying trip, during which they make every wrong decision humanly possible to find the perfect present for the baby who seems to have everything. Hugh Dennis and Abigail Cruttenden join the cast, with Lee Mack, Sally Bretton and Katy Wix.(n)

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lucy decides she wants to have a baby, but what she didn't expect was for the whole family to take a personal interest in the conception. Lee thinks he should be the one, of course - so he can't believe it when she reveals she is planning to have the child with another man. Lee Mack and Sally Bretton star, with Katy Wix, Bobby Ball, Geoffrey Whitehead and Deborah Grant.(n)

programme.title: Mock the Week
programme.desc: Marcus Brigstocke, Gary Delaney and Zoe Lyons join host Dara O Briain and panellists Hugh Dennis, Andy Parsons and Chris Addison for another round of the satirical news quiz from July 2012.(n)

programme.title: QI

programme.title: Top Gear

programme.title: Top Gear

programme.title: Taskmaster

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games

programme.desc: Frank Skinner chairs the comedy panel show, inviting comedian Ross Noble, R'n'B singer Jamelia and academic Germaine Greer to compete to have their pet hates banished for ever. Their gripes include folk-dancing, health-and-safety, text speak, smelly people, actors and fun-runs.(n)

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Stephen Fry asks Alan Davies, Dara O Briain, Rich Hall and Arthur Smith for more interesting answers on subjects including biscuits, ballet and baboons in the mind-boggling quiz show.(n)

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: Matt Lucas, Holly Walsh and Susan Calman join regular panellist Alan Davies, as questionmaster Sandi Toksvig opens her post in a post-themed edition. As ever, correctness and even intelligence go out of the window as the panellists attempt to answer the fiendishly difficult questions, with points invariably awarded for the answers the questionmaster finds most interesting, as opposed to correct.(n)

programme.title: QI XL
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig hosts an extended edition of the panel show, and invites Jason Manford, Sara Pascoe, Jeremy Clarkson and Alan Davies to answer questions on the subject of 'noble rot'. programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Five new contestants, James Acaster, Jessica Knappett, Kerry Godliman, Phil Wang and Rhod Gilbert, complete a series of tasks.(n)

programme.title: Coast
programme.desc: The team travels from Dublin to Derry. On the way, Miranda Krestovnikoff visits the only beach race in Europe run under Jockey Club rules at Laytown Races and Alice Roberts finds herself sent to the Irish salt mines. Mark Horton investigates a lost year in the life of the world's first ocean liner, while Neil Oliver meets the Londonderry women who secretly witnessed the surrender of German U-Boats at the end of the Second World War.(n)

programme.title: Coast
programme.desc: The changing landscape of the coastline from Newcastle to Hull. Neil Oliver explores the ancient coastal home of the Venerable Bede, and goes to Bridlington to learn about the 200-year struggle to design an unsinkable lifeboat. Mark Horton discovers how laser technology could predict coastal erosion, Dick Strawbridge finds out how Middlesbrough's Transporter Bridge put the city on the map, and Miranda Krestovnikoff heads to Bempton Cliffs.(n)

programme.title: Secrets of the Third Reich
programme.sub-title: Secrets of the Third Reich: The Nazi Gold Train

programme.title: Train Truckers

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: The Blue Planet
programme.desc: Veteran naturalist David Attenborough explores the fragile marine ecosystem of the coral reef, where all creatures, including the corals themselves, have to fight for survival. From tiny beginnings, the reef grows and develops over hundreds of years, providing support for innumerable animals - yet one storm can threaten the entire community.(n)

programme.title: The Blue Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough investigates the opportunities tides create for marine life, showing giant stingrays gliding on currents for a rest, South African sea snails surfing the waves in pursuit of a meal, crabs playing football on a beach, and bottlenose dolphins embarking on a dangerous game of catch. In the oceanic world each turn of the tide can mean life or death for its inhabitants.(n)

programme.title: The Blue Planet
programme.desc: Exploring the wealth of marine life that inhabits the ocean's edge, dealing with the dangers of an ever-shifting environment. David Attenborough observes nesting seabirds in east Russia, Patagonian killer whales, Newfoundland caplin fish, walruses, and Brazilian green turtles - which make their annual expedition to an island in the middle of the Atlantic to lay their eggs.(n)

programme.title: Secrets of Britain

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: The remarkable story of how Stalin's massive war factories were dismantled and moved east on one and half million railway trucks, to avoid being lost to the Nazis.(n)

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.desc: Monsieur Alphonse and Rene decide to duel with pistols to determine who should win Edith's hand, while Hitler orders the Colonel's arrest.(n)

programme.title: Private Benjamin (1980)
programme.desc: A scatterbrained society woman looks for a change of pace after her husband dies on their wedding night, and is tricked by a duplicitous recruiter into enlisting in the army. In spite of the initial culture shock and conflict with her tough commanding officer, she gradually finds direction and self-esteem for the first time in her life. Upon completion of basic training, she meets a dashing French doctor, who is in Biloxi for a medical conference. They part ways after a brief romance but it is not long before she must decide between her Army career or love. Comedy, starring Goldie Hawn, Armand Assante, Eileen Brennan, Harry Dean Stanton, Sam Wanamaker and Barbara Barrie.(n)

programme.desc: Jessica investigates a murder in the world of high finance when her stockbrocker is killed. Her list of suspects appears to be endless, including the secretary who seems to have been doing all of the broker's work. Starring Angela Lansbury.(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica is stunned to discover after uncovering a trail of feuding and intrigue in the Californian property business, that her niece is the logical prime suspect for the murder of a rich movie heiress in Beverly Hills. Starring Angela Lansbury.(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica reunites the suspects of a 25-year-old murder case to try to put an end to the mystery once and for all - but the exercise leads to more grim consequences. Crime drama, starring Angela Lansbury, with Donald O'Connor and Anne Francis.(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Maggie McCauley, Jessica's former student and now the producer of a TV police show, gets involved in a heated argument with the network programmer who is planning to cancel the series. When her colleague is found dead in suspicious circumstances, Maggie draws upon the deductive skills gleaned from her mentor to repel the accusations against her and find the real killer.(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica comes to the aid of old friend and New York police officer James O'Malley, who is investigating a suicide he believes was actually a murder. Starring Angela Lansbury.(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A former jewel thief and Jessica's friend Dennis Stanton spends a romantic evening with a woman, only to find himself the prime suspect in a puzzling murder. A coin collector is found dead and the sleuth must try to prevent an injustice being done. Keith Michell guest stars, with Angela Lansbury and Dina Merrill.(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica is invited to her cousin's wedding, but the groom is murdered well before he reaches 'till death us do part'. The amateur sleuth immediately sets out to unmask the culprit and wonders whether the gruesome event could be linked to the release of the bride's brother from a psychiatric institution. Angela Lansbury stars.(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica's nephew Grady and his pregnant wife Donna agree to house-sit for the mystery-solving author while she is out of town, and are shocked when they wake one night to discover the body of a peg-legged man in her living room. Whodunit, starring Angela Lansbury.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Reports of sexual abuse surface at an elite private school, prompting Detective Benson and ADA Barba to confront a powerful administrator to expose decades of secrets. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A man goes on a killing spree, leaving Benson and the team to detain a prostitute who is part of his social circle. As the detectives work with her to track down their quarry, they find themselves drawn into her world and must fight to save her life. Hard-hitting drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The rape and murder of a criminology student puts detectives Stabler and Benson on the trail of a killer with an expert knowledge of forensics. A discovery about the victim's mentor places him at the top of their list of suspects - but as further evidence is gathered, it begins to seem that someone might have tried to frame him for the crime.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detective Munch becomes personally involved in the prosecution of a terminally ill embryologist who is accused of assisting a depressed woman in committing suicide. Evidence points overwhelmingly to her guilt - but the jury finds it hard to decide her fate. Hard-hitting police drama, guest starring Marlee Matlin.(n)

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Bull makes a deal with top criminal attorney JP Nunnelly to defend Benny when he goes to trial for misconduct in a case related to his former career with the District Attorney's office. Eliza Dushku guest stars.(n)

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: JP Nunnelly seeks repayment for defending Benny at trial, and asks Bull to help her deal with a case involving a morally dubious computer cloud company.(n)

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. programme.title: Columbo: Uneasy Lies the Crown (1990)
programme.desc: A dentist with gambling debts discovers his wife is having an affair with one of his patients and wants a divorce. He plans to take revenge by poisoning the lover with his wife's heart medication, so she will be suspected - but he reckons without the attentions of the crumpled cop. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, James Read, Paul Burke, Jo Anderson and Nancy Walker.(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Any Old Port in a Storm (1973)
programme.desc: A vineyard owner's financial security is jeopardised when his playboy younger brother threatens to sell the family winery. He resorts to killing his sibling and rigging the death scene to look like a scuba-diving accident. However, the crumpled cop sees through the ruse and in the process reveals he is something of a wine buff himself. Detective drama, with Peter Falk, Donald Pleasence and Julie Harris.(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Ashes to Ashes (1998)
programme.desc: The shabby sleuth investigates the complex case of a murdered Hollywood gossip writer. He uses his unique talents to interrogate a smooth-talking funeral director, who was once romantically involved with the victim and one of the last people to see her alive. Detective drama, with Peter Falk. Patrick McGoohan co-stars and directs.(n)

programme.title: Columbo: The Bye-Bye Sky-High IQ Murder Case (1977)
programme.desc: An accountant who has a reputation as being one of the brightest men in the world realises he has to kill a fellow genius to cover up his illegal activities. He puts his remarkable intelligence to the task of covering up every possible clue that could lead back to him - but has not counted on the equally sharp mind of slovenly sleuth Columbo. Crime drama, with Peter Falk and Theodore Bikel.(n)

programme.title: Columbo Cries Wolf (1990)
programme.desc: The slovenly sleuth suspects the owner of a men's magazine is behind the strange disappearance of his business partner and former lover. The suspect insists the woman is still alive, while the detective struggles to prove his guilt owing to the absence of a body. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Ian Buchanan, Rebecca Staab, Deidre Hall and Alan Scarfe.(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Double Exposure (1973)
programme.desc: A maker of motivational films based on subliminal messages uses his expertise to plant a subconscious command in the mind of a rival to lure him to his death. However, any hopes of his getting away with it are dashed by the arrival of a certain shabby sleuth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Robert Culp, Robert Middleton, Louise Latham and Arlene Martel.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate the murder of a diver of Middle Eastern descent whose body has been found washed ashore on Coney Island. Initial inquiries indicate the dead man may have been planning a terrorist attack, but the detectives later find themselves caught up in a plot to prevent the truth being revealed.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU's holiday celebrations are disrupted when Detective Tutuola's ex-brother-in-law is arrested for a brutal attack of a priest just before Christmas. He protests his innocence despite a significant criminal record, and appeals to the force to find evidence that exonerates him. In the process, a buried church scandal begins to unravel. Starring Ice-T, Olivia Benson and Nick Amaro.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Two ambitious district attorneys clash over a murder case, and Benson is sure the prosecuting county has wrongly accused a rape victim of killing her ex-boyfriend. New evidence and a different suspect are put forward, but the Suffolk County DA will not drop her case. Hard-hitting drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler investigate the murder of an elderly woman who they learn was dying of cancer but had been determined to live out her final days to the full - a philosophy that encompassed dating a variety of men. Discovering her most recent gentleman callers all have alibis, they turn their attention to the murder weapon and realise they are looking for a serial killer. Anthony Rapp and Jane Krakowski guest star.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Novak enlists Clark's help to gather evidence against a judge whose unacceptable bias in two child-abuse cases resulted in the death of a youngster and the wrongful imprisonment of an innocent woman. Police drama, starring Diane Neal, Marlo Thomas, Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay.(n)

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: The Trial Analysis team heads to Miami with JP Nunnelly to work on a drug trafficking case in which both their clients and the jurors' lives are in jeopardy.(n)

programme.desc: A woman confesses to murdering her husband, but the evidence clears her of any wrongdoing and raises several disturbing new lines of inquiry - including the possibility that a serial killer may be stalking the city. programme.title: Bull

programme.desc: The admissions director of an exclusive Manhattan elementary school is bludgeoned to death and Briscoe and Green initially believe she was murdered by a parent determined to have their child enrolled. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a woman dies in a hospital emergency room, Briscoe and Logan investigate a doctor's unorthodox method of treating cancer, which McCoy intends to prove is negligent homicide. Sam Waterston joins the cast.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman lies in a coma after being found with a bullet in her head, leaving Briscoe and Logan to investigate whether her abusive husband is responsible for shooting her. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green are called in to investigate the murder of a notorious bounty hunter. Piecing together his final movements, they turn their attentions to a meeting between the victim and an ambitious journalist, which may be able to shed light on what happened.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A wealthy Wall Street stockbroker's death looks like suicide, but Logan suspects otherwise and pins the blame on the man's protege. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: After a woman is killed during an attempt to shoot her husband, the team discover the couple were attending an infertility clinic where the doctor was involved in illegal practices. However, they find themselves unable to arrest him due to confidentiality rules, and his patients' reluctance to talk.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A marine major is found dead in an underground maintenance room, having scratched out one of his own eyes - and the presence of a webcam suggests someone watched him die. The team investigates with the help of Lt Col Hollis Mann, and links the case to wanted terrorist Mamoun Sharif, an old adversary who is threatening to unleash a chemical attack.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The agents try to track down an arms dealer who has the launch codes for the Navy's encrypted satellite defence system and is offering them to the highest bidder. In an attempt to win the confidence of the buyer, Ducky poses as an ageing Englishman trying to sell the information. Guest starring Armand Assante, with David McCallum and Mark Harmon.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A nuclear power plant inspector suffers radiation poisoning, forcing the team to consider the possibility that a foreign power deliberately targeted him. As the others investigate, Ziva spends time with the ailing victim - and begins to realise she is developing feelings for him. Drama, guest starring Matthew Marsden, with Cote de Pablo.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An explosion at a mausoleum exposes a number of freshly dismembered bodies, prompting the team to launch a multiple murder investigation to identify the victims. Meanwhile, Abby has a personal problem to deal with - and it seems Gibbs is the only person she will confide in. Drama, starring Pauley Perrette and Mark Harmon.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A petty officer is found murdered on a golf course, and when it emerges his amateur radio habit might be the key to catching the killer, McGee gets a chance to revisit his favourite childhood hobby bt spending hours on the victim's ham radio. programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team is tasked to track down a man who is picking up and then attacking closet gay married men. After a suspect is apprehended, his attorney manages to muddy the waters regarding the legitimacy of the arrest. Mariska Hargitay and Raul Esparza star.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and Claire Rawle hunt for bargains in Scarborough, with finds including a pair of Charles Barlow vases, before heading to auction in Beverley, East Yorkshire.(n)

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Paul Laidlaw and Claire Rawle set off on the final road trip leg from the Derbyshire town of Matlock. Militaria mad Paul hopes a late 17th-century hand-forged halberd head earns him a huge profit. Claire buys a Chinese cloisonné vase and an Edwardian inkstand. Paul also unravels the story behind the world-famous crooked church tower at Chesterfield and Claire meets a relative of the first man to circumnavigate Australia, who hails from the Lincolnshire town of Donnington. The pressure is on at the final auction in Stamford, Lincolnshire.(n)

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Ambulance
programme.desc: Return of the award-winning documentary following the work of the West Midlands Ambulance Service. Call assessor Shanie, who has just graduated, guides a woman through childbirth over the phone, and a specialised mental health team is sent to help a man showing signs of agitation at a community centre. Meanwhile, a day shift takes an unexpected and very personal turn for paramedic Nat when a 999 call about an unconscious patient turns out to be referring to her teenage daughter, who has taken ill at school.(n)

programme.title: Nothing to Declare

programme.title: Nothing to Declare

programme.title: Nothing to Declare

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series is centred around the roads of Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. There is also footage of drivers falling asleep at the wheel, overloaded vehicles and suspects caught with illegal substances - plus a host of excuses as the people pulled over try to persuade officers they have not done anything wrong.(n)

programme.title: Micky Flanagan's Detour de France
programme.desc: The comedian and his friend Noel continue their journey through France by heading south. Stopping off in Camargue, they are thrown into the thick of an annual gypsy festival and sample the wares of a cosmic wine-maker. The duo move on to St Remy and the Saint Paul de Mausole, a psychiatric hospital that uses art and music to treat troubled individuals - and it turns out one of the centre's most famous patients was Vincent van Gogh. In Monaco, they are joined on their bikes by former F1 star David Coulthard, before Micky makes a splash in a transvestite bar in Cannes.(n)

programme.title: Micky Flanagan's Detour de France
programme.desc: The end is in sight for comedian Micky Flanagan and best mate Noel Lynch, but before they say 'au revoir' to France, they have a few more trips to make. They begin in Marseille, the second largest city in the country, where they learn about the ancient martial art of savate and taste the world's most expensive soup. Then it's on to Lourdes, before a quick trip to Bordeaux to sample a particularly revered bottle of wine and visit a museum dedicated to berets. Their tour comes to an end in Paris, city 'de l'amour', where they seal their bromance on the Love Lock bridge.(n)

programme.title: Banged Up Abroad
programme.desc: Dramatic reconstruction of the story of Major Phil Ashby of the Royal Marines, who was attacked by child soldiers during a UN peacekeeping mission to disarm warring factions in Sierra Leone, West Africa. Surrounded, outgunned and outnumbered, he risked everything in a desperate bid to escape through 50 miles of rebel-controlled jungle in 2000.(n)

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Colin Morgan returns as the talented young wizard to protect Camelot from a fresh batch of foes. When slippery servant Cedric starts causing trouble, Merlin discovers the newcomer is a conman who hopes to get his hands on a precious jewel recently unearthed from a tomb. But without the support of Arthur, Merlin has to find help from the creature he swore never to trust again - the Great Dragon. Mackenzie Crook guest stars, with Bradley James.(n)

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Worried that the knights will let him win because of who he is, Arthur enters Camelot's jousting competition anonymously. Though he struggles to adapt to living undercover at Gwen's house without the privileges of rank, the prince is so determined to prove he can do it that he fails to spot the danger from a bounty hunter sent to kill him. Fantasy drama, guest starring Adrian Lester, with Bradley James and Angel Coulby.(n)

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Morgana begins to wonder whether she has magic powers, but Gaius insists she remain ignorant of her potential for her own good. Merlin refuses to accept the decision, and in wilfully disobeying his master, he reunites Morgana with Mordred, the boy the Dragon predicts will one day kill Arthur. Drama, starring Katie McGrath, Richard Wilson and Colin Morgan, with Colin Salmon.(n)

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Gwen is mistaken for Morgana and kidnapped by savage outlaw Hengist, prompting Arthur to defy his father and race into enemy territory to her rescue. However, he finds she is not alone in the abductor's castle - Lancelot is already there. Fantasy drama, starring Angel Coulby, Bradley James and Santiago Cabrera.(n)

programme.title: Merlin
programme.sub-title: Beauty and the Beast - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Uther becomes infatuated with the beautiful Lady Catrina, a newcomer to Camelot. However, Merlin realises she is really a troll hiding her true identity behind magic. As the young wizard fights to prove to the disbelieving Arthur that the woman is a monster, it becomes clear she is motivated by more than the prospect of winning the king's heart. Fantasy drama, guest starring Sarah Parish and Adam Godley.(n)

programme.title: Merlin
programme.sub-title: Beauty and the Beast - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. Having married Uther, Queen Catrina increases her influence over Camelot. Her accusation that Merlin is a thief forces the wizard into hiding, leaving him to seek evidence that she is secretly a troll. If that were not hard enough, he must also identify the spell that will break her hold over the king. Fantasy drama, starring Colin Morgan and Anthony Head, with Sarah Parish and Adam Godley.(n)

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: Uther invites notorious witch-hunter Aredian to Camelot in a desperate bid to rid the kingdom of magic, and no one is beyond his suspicion. Morgana is certain the ruthless detective will burn her at the stake, so it is up to Merlin to try to save her without landing himself in trouble. Fantasy drama, guest starring Charles Dance, with Anthony Head and Colin Morgan.(n)

programme.title: Meet the Lords
programme.desc: Peers turn out in huge numbers to have their say on the most important issue in decades and decide whether to rebel on Brexit or not, while there are ermine gowns to put on and ancient traditions to follow for the day of the Queen's speech - the biggest ceremonial event of the year. Plans to overhaul Parliament's Victorian sewage system could mean a move for the five or so years the work will take, and Baroness D'Souza has new research about peers who claim expenses without contributing to the House.(n)

programme.title: The Purple Plain (1954)
programme.desc: A Canadian squadron leader's increasingly strange behaviour begins to worry the officers of an RAF station deep in the Burmese jungle. There is further concern when the unstable pilot crashes his plane miles from the base, forcing him to make an exhausting trek back to safety. Second World War drama, starring Gregory Peck, Bernard Lee, Brenda de Banzi and Maurice Denham.(n)

programme.title: Pirates of Somalia (2017)

programme.title: Kidnapping Freddy Heineken (2015)

The plan is a success, and they demand the biggest ransom in history - but tensions within the group threaten their chances of escaping the law. Fact-based crime drama, starring Anthony Hopkins, Jim Sturgess and Sam Worthington.(n)

programme.title: The Harder They Come (1973)
programme.desc: A naive young man from rural Jamaica heads for Kingston in search of reggae stardom, only to get involved in the shady world of drug dealing as his musical career takes off. With no other option but to go on the run, he fights back against the system which forced him into a life of crime and becomes a political hero in the process. Crime drama, starring Jimmy Cliff, Janet Barkley, Carl Bradshaw and Bob Charlton.(n)

programme.title: Run
programme.desc: Recovering heroin addict Richard spends every day struggling to stay off drugs and only one thing spurs him on - the possibility of re-establishing contact with his teenage daughter. Faced with the prospect of never seeing her again, he's torn between returning to his old ways and salvaging the only relationship that matters to him. The third of four dramas telling the stories of seemingly unconnected people facing life-changing decisions, starring Lennie James, Mona Hammond, Darren Raymond and Brad Damon.(n)

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner.(n)

programme.title: All Star Family Fortunes
programme.sub-title: All Star Family Fortunes Christmas Special
programme.desc: Teams from The Only Way Is Essex and Benidorm take part in a festive edition of the game show. The ITV2 reality show is represented by Nanny Pat, Joey Essex, Mark Wright, James 'Arg' Argent and former star Amy Childs, while their competitors from the ITV1 comedy series comprise Jake Canuso (Mateo), Janine Duvitski (Jacqueline), Kenny Ireland (Donald), Elsie Kelly (Noreen) and Oliver Stokes (Michael). The contestants must try to guess the answers to surveys of 100 people in a bid to reach the final round, in which they can win up to £30,000 for a charity of their choice. Vernon Kay hosts.(n)
